title: Bill to Law
short_description: How does an idea become a real law? Put the scrambled steps of each civic process in order and pass it — skip a step and it gets stuck in committee.
description: How does an idea become a real law? Step by step! Put the scrambled steps of each civic process in the right order, then pass it — democracy has an order of operations, and skipping a step gets the whole thing stuck in committee. It teaches sequencing and how government actually works, with kid-friendly walkthroughs of how a bill becomes a law, how an election runs, how a town fixes a problem, how a court trial works and more. Grade bands ramp from 3-step processes, to 4–5 steps, to the full 6-step law-making sequence. A free online civics and government-process game for kids in grades 2–5, with streak bonuses feeding your score and GP.
controls: Mouse / tap steps to add them to the ordered list, Undo to fix, then Pass it.
